title: Operator-defined model aliases (cycle-099 model_aliases_extra)
description: DD-2 + DD-5 resolution per cycle-099 SDD §3.2. Schema-versioned object validating operator-controlled model entries added via `.loa.config.yaml::model_aliases_extra`. Per NFR-Sec-5 the `auth` field is forbidden — operators reuse the provider's existing credential env var. Per FR-1.4, entries without an explicit `permissions` block MUST set `acknowledge_permissions_baseline: true` to opt into the minimal baseline.

schema_version.description: Bumped on breaking schema changes. Cycle-099 ships v1.0.0.

entries.description:
List of operator-added model entries. Each entry mirrors the SoT `providers.

.models.` shape minus the `auth` field.

id.description: FR-2.8 normalization. Rejects shell metacharacters, path separators, NUL bytes. Operator-visible alias used in `skill_models` references.

provider.description: NFR-Sec-4: new provider types require a System Zone change (.claude/defaults/loa.defaults.yaml::providers). Operators cannot register new provider types via .loa.config.yaml.

api_id.description: Vendor-side model id sent over the wire (e.g., `gpt-5.5-pro`). Same charset as `id`.

endpoint_family.description: Provider endpoint family. Chat = OpenAI Chat Completions / Anthropic Messages legacy. Responses = OpenAI Responses (gpt-5.x/codex). Messages = Anthropic Messages. Converse = AWS Bedrock Converse.

endpoint.description: OPTIONAL — defaults to provider's framework default. If supplied, MUST match provider's allowed_endpoints in loa.defaults.yaml at load time (FR-2.8). Validated by the cycle-099 endpoint-validator (Sprint 1E.b).

capabilities.description: At least one capability required. Used by skills to filter candidate models (e.g., flatline_protocol requires `tools`).

context_window.description: Vendor-published context window in tokens. Used by Bridgebuilder truncation table.

token_param.description: Vendor's parameter name for the output-token limit. OpenAI Chat = max_tokens; Responses = max_completion_tokens; Anthropic = max_tokens; Bedrock = max_tokens.

input_per_mtok.description: Cost per million input tokens, in micro-cents (10^-8 USD). E.g., $5 / mtok = 5000000.

output_per_mtok.description: Cost per million output tokens, in micro-cents.

pricing.description: Per-mtok pricing in micro-cents. Used by L2 cost-budget enforcer.

max_input.description: OPTIONAL operator-imposed max input tokens (overrides context_window for input budgeting).

truncation_coefficient.description: Bridgebuilder truncation budget as fraction of context_window. Default 0.7 framework-wide.

permissions.description: OPTIONAL — operator-supplied per-model permissions block. If present, validated against framework provider baseline (FR-1.4). If absent, the FR-1.4 minimal baseline (`chat` only) applies + `acknowledge_permissions_baseline: true` is required (see allOf). Sprint 3 expands this block per DD-1 Option B; Sprint 2 leaves the inner shape OPEN.

acknowledge_permissions_baseline.description: FR-1.4: explicit operator opt-in to minimal-only permissions when no `permissions` block is supplied. Required when `permissions` is absent (see allOf clause).
